files.00_Overview.md: Strong overview with 3W structure. Keep 'Why', 'Quick Reference', and module contents table. Consider expanding the flowchart to show how dimensions propagate through operations.
files.01_Introduction.md: Good practical intro. Add 'Learning Objectives' at top. The 'Quick Reference' is valuable—retain. Merge the redundant SI dimensions table into Overview since it appears in both files.
files.02_Physics_Aware_Type_System.md: Excellent conceptual depth. The 7-dimension tables (appears twice) are redundant—consolidate into one definitive reference. Keep the mermaid flowcharts showing type checking logic.
files.03_Implementation_Mechanisms.md: Strong technical content showing operator overloading internals. Add missing 'Common Pitfalls' section about disabling checks. The 'Checking Control' section is important—expand with best practices.
files.04_Template_Metaprogramming.md: Good template explanation. The 'Field Integration' and 'Type Aliases' sections overlap with 03_—consolidate to avoid redundancy. Add more concrete examples of when you'd write custom dimensioned types.
files.05_Pitfalls_and_Solutions.md: Highly valuable practical content. Add 'Learning Objectives'. Consider organizing pitfalls by severity (compile-time vs runtime). The 'Quick Troubleshooting' table is excellent—keep.
files.06_Engineering_Benefits.md: Good motivational content. The 'Equation Verification' example is strong—keep. Some overlap with 05_—merge the performance impact discussion into one place.
files.07_Mathematical_Formulations.md: Advanced theory well-presented. The Buckingham π theorem and non-dimensionalization sections are unique and valuable. The dimensionSet table repeats from earlier files—reference earlier file instead.
files.08_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Good summary structure. Exercises are practical but could use more progression difficulty levels. The 'Solutions' section is helpful—consider adding more inline hints.

global_strategy: This is a cohesive learning sequence with good progression from concepts → implementation → pitfalls → advanced theory. Main issues: (1) SI dimensions table repeated in 5+ files—consolidate into single reference in Overview; (2) 'Quick Reference' blocks appear in 7/9 files with significant overlap—standardize and reference; (3) Template metaprogramming content spread across 03_ and 04_—merge with clear delineation; (4) Missing 'Learning Objectives' in most files; (5) Some redundancy in engineering benefits vs pitfalls—merge complementary sections. Recommend keeping the 8-file structure but with tighter cross-referencing and eliminating duplicate reference tables.
